title: T6 Packaging & wiring (exports, ruff/mypy/tests green)
description: tasks.md group 6: export SyncTransport/AsyncTransport/TransportConfig/errors from transport/__init__.py; run ruff + mypy + full test suite and fix until green.
acceptance_criteria: Public exports importable; ruff, mypy, and pytest all pass.
close_reason: Public exports wired with __all__; full quality gate green (69 tests, ruff/mypy/deptry)

title: T4 SyncTransport over httpx.Client
description: tasks.md group 4: SyncTransport.get/set_cf_clearance/set_user_agent/close + context manager applying throttle+retry+classify. Tests via httpx.MockTransport/respx: 200->HTML; cookie+UA attached; 404/CF/429 mapped; transient retried then ok; exhausted->TransientTransportError; CF/404 not retried; set_* refresh; min_interval enforced.
acceptance_criteria: All sync transport scenarios from spec covered and green.
close_reason: SyncTransport over httpx.Client complete with throttle+retry+classify; 12 sync tests covering all spec scenarios; 53 tests green, ruff/mypy clean

title: T5 AsyncTransport over httpx.AsyncClient
description: tasks.md group 5: AsyncTransport async get/aclose + async context manager + set_*, reusing shared core (asyncio.sleep throttle). Async tests mirroring T4; sync/async parity test (same response -> same result/error type).
acceptance_criteria: All async scenarios + parity test green.
close_reason: AsyncTransport over httpx.AsyncClient complete; 14 async tests + sync/async parity; 67 tests green, ruff/mypy clean

title: T3 Sans-I/O core (classify_response, retry policy, throttle calc)
description: tasks.md group 3: transport/core.py classify_response(status,headers,text) per detection order (404->CF challenge->429->transient->OK); pure request assembly (URL join + cookie/header); tenacity retry predicate (transient only, backoff+jitter); throttle wait-time calc. Unit-test classify truth table and throttle calc with monkeypatched clock.
acceptance_criteria: classify_response truth table tests pass (200/404/403+cf-mitigated/503+body/429/5xx); throttle calc tested; retry predicate retries only TransientTransportError.
close_reason: Sans-I/O core complete: classify_response truth table + CF detection + retry-after parsing, tenacity retry controller (transient-only), throttle_wait, header/cookie assembly; 41 tests green, ruff/mypy clean

title: T2 Errors & config (TransportError hierarchy, TransportConfig)
description: tasks.md group 2: transport/errors.py with TransportError + CloudflareChallengeError/NotFoundError/RateLimitedError(retry_after)/TransientTransportError; test hierarchy catchable as TransportError and VgmdbClientError; transport/config.py pydantic TransportConfig with design defaults.
acceptance_criteria: Error hierarchy + tests pass; TransportConfig validates with documented defaults.
close_reason: Transport error hierarchy (TransportError + 4 subclasses, RateLimitedError.retry_after) and pydantic TransportConfig with defaults+validation, all TDD; 18 tests green, ruff/mypy clean

title: T1 Deps & scaffolding (transport pkg, errors base)
description: tasks.md group 1: add runtime deps httpx/tenacity/pydantic + dev dep respx to pyproject and sync lockfile; create transport/ package and tests/unit_tests/transport/; add src/vgmdb_client/errors.py with VgmdbClientError base.
acceptance_criteria: Deps in pyproject + lockfile synced; transport package and test package exist; VgmdbClientError importable.
close_reason: Deps added (httpx/tenacity/pydantic + respx), package skeleton scaffolded, VgmdbClientError base implemented via TDD; ruff/mypy/pytest green

title: M4 Client API: Client/AsyncClient with get_album + search
description: Public API composing Transport (M2) + Parsers (M3) over a shared core. Client (sync) and AsyncClient (async) exposing get_album(id) and search(query), returning pydantic models. No duplicated parsing logic between sync/async.
acceptance_criteria: Client.get_album/search and AsyncClient equivalents return validated models against live vgmdb with injected token; shared core; both covered by tests.

title: M3 Parsers: clean-room album + search HTML parsers
description: Clean-room pure functions html->model for the album page and search results. We own every selector (no hufman in the runtime path). Validated against M5 fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: parse_album(html)->Album and parse_search(html)->results as pure functions; pass against all seed fixtures; handle multi-disc and missing-field edge cases.

title: M5 Fixtures (seed): captured HTML + golden outputs
description: A captured seed dataset of album/search HTML pages plus golden expected outputs (typed via M1 models), wired into the test suite. Foundation for the Beta parsing-quality harness.
acceptance_criteria: Seed album + search HTML fixtures stored; golden expected model outputs alongside; tests load fixtures and assert parser output.

title: M2 Transport: httpx sync+async, cf_clearance, typed errors
description: httpx-based fetcher (sync + async). Manual cf_clearance cookie + matching User-Agent injection. Retries. Typed errors distinguishing a Cloudflare challenge from a genuine 404/not-found. Runtime does not attempt to beat Cloudflare.
acceptance_criteria: Sync and async fetch of a vgmdb URL with injected cf_clearance/UA; retry on transient failure; distinct exception types for CF-challenge vs 404.

title: M1 Models (core): Album, Track, Credit, search results
description: pydantic v2 models forming the shared vocabulary every layer speaks: Album, Track, Credit, and search-result types. Foundation for parsers, client, and fixtures golden outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Album/Track/Credit and search-result models defined as pydantic v2; importable from the package; typed and documented.

title: MVP: first usable vgmdb-client (album + search)
description: First usable version of vgmdb-client: a typed, direct-to-vgmdb.net Python library returning pydantic models. Covers Albums-by-ID and Search, sync + async, over a shared parsing/model core, with a caller-supplied cf_clearance token. See docs/superpowers/2026-06-14_vgmdb_client.md and _feature_map.md.
design: Clean-room HTML parsing (no hufman in runtime path). Layers: Models (pydantic v2), Transport (httpx sync+async, manual cf_clearance/UA, typed CF-challenge vs 404 errors), Parsers (pure html->model), Client API (Client/AsyncClient). Fixture-based tests.

title: B3 More entities: Artist, Product, Organization
description: Extend models + clean-room parsers + client methods to Artist, Product, and Organization entities (commonly referenced from albums).
acceptance_criteria: get_artist/get_product/get_organization (sync+async) return validated models, fixture-tested; models added to M1 family.

title: B2 Parsing-quality harness: hufman vs ours vs ours+LLM
description: Compare hufman output vs our parser vs our parser + LLM deep-parse over the fixtures dataset, with quality reporting to rank parser/LLM choices. hufman (MIT) vendored as a DEV-ONLY benchmark dependency; never enters the runtime library.
acceptance_criteria: Harness runs all three parsers over the fixtures, emits a per-field comparison/quality report; hufman isolated to dev/benchmark extras only.

title: B1 Deep-parse helper (LLM/ML) for freeform fields
description: Opt-in enrichment of freeform fields (track-level contributions, detailed roles from the Notes/Information tab). Pluggable backend: first an optional LLM_URL -> OpenAI-compatible HTTP endpoint; embedded lightweight ML later. Shipped as an opt-in extra (e.g. vgmdb-client[llm]).
acceptance_criteria: Given parsed album + raw freeform text, helper returns enriched structured fields via an OpenAI-compatible endpoint configured by LLM_URL; degrades gracefully when unset; backend is pluggable.

title: Beta: measure & enrich (deep-parse + harness + more entities)
description: Adds opt-in LLM/ML deep-parse of freeform fields, a parsing-quality comparison harness (hufman vs ours vs ours+LLM), and more entities (Artist/Product/Organization). See docs/superpowers/2026-06-14_vgmdb_client_feature_map.md.
design: Deep-parse backend: optional LLM_URL -> OpenAI-compatible endpoint first; embedded lightweight ML later. hufman (MIT) vendored as dev-only benchmark dependency, never in runtime.

title: Transport: throttle concurrency + per-retry spacing (code-review follow-up)
description: Code-review findings on the simple politeness throttle: (1) AsyncTransport._throttle reads/writes self._last without synchronization, so concurrent get() coroutines race and defeat min_interval under concurrency; (2) the throttle is applied once per get() before the retry loop, so retried attempts within one get() are spaced only by backoff, not min_interval. Consider an async-safe gate (lock/semaphore) and applying the throttle per HTTP attempt.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent async get() calls honor min_interval; retried attempts are throttled; covered by tests.

title: Transport: debug-level per-request logging (D7 deferral)
description: design.md D7 specifies stdlib logging with debug-level per-request logs (method, path, status, attempt) in SyncTransport/AsyncTransport. Deferred from the transport-layer change: it is not a spec requirement and was not in tasks.md. Add a module logger emitting debug logs per request/attempt.
acceptance_criteria: Both clients emit debug-level logs per request (method, path, status, attempt) via logging.getLogger(__name__); covered by a test (e.g. caplog).

title: V1c Release polish: docs site + PyPI publish
description: Full MkDocs documentation site with examples, and PyPI publishing of vgmdb-client. Final polish gate for V1.
acceptance_criteria: Docs site builds and deploys; package published to PyPI; install + quickstart verified from a clean environment.

title: V1b Remaining entities: Events, releases, etc.
description: Add models + clean-room parsers + client methods for Events, releases, and any remaining vgmdb entity types not covered in MVP/Beta.
acceptance_criteria: Remaining entity fetchers (sync+async) return validated models, fixture-tested.

title: V1a Auth-token helper: fill/renew cf_clearance
description: Assist the user in filling/renewing the cf_clearance token (UX/design TBD). Explicitly NOT about defeating Cloudflare login/challenge. Builds on Transport.
acceptance_criteria: A documented helper flow that obtains/refreshes a working cf_clearance + matching UA and feeds it to the client; no automated CF-challenge defeat.

title: V1: complete & polished (auth helper + remaining entities + release)
description: Completes the library: cf_clearance auth-token fill/renew helper, remaining entities (Events, releases), full docs site and PyPI publish. See docs/superpowers/2026-06-14_vgmdb_client_feature_map.md.
design: Auth helper assists token fill/renew, does NOT defeat Cloudflare. Release polish: MkDocs site + PyPI.
